prediction.reasoning: For a 2-day prediction of MCD stock, I used a random walk model assuming daily volatility of approximately 1.2% based on typical large-cap stock behavior. Confidence intervals reflect increasing uncertainty with higher confidence levels, with the 2-day standard deviation estimated at ~1.7% of current price.
